hook.summary: A hand selects colored boxes to catch matching blocks falling from a conveyor belt.
hook.visual_action: A hand clicks on colored boxes at the bottom to move them onto a track where matching blocks fall.

scene_flow: Introduction of the puzzle layout with a multi-colored block conveyor belt.
The player selects an orange box to catch orange blocks, followed by a yellow box.
Boxes fill to 100% and disappear, progressing the level counter.
Gameplay intensifies as blocks move faster and multiple boxes are managed simultaneously.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy satisfying sorting and organization puzzles.
